messages.content:
Summarize the CVE description using professional cybersecurity language.

A vulnerability has been found in code-projects Chat System 1.0 and classified as critical. Affected by this vulnerability is an unknown functionality of the file /admin/deleteroom.php. The manipulation of the argument id leads to sql injection. The attack can be launched remotely. The exploit has been disclosed to the public and may be used.

A critical vulnerability in code-projects Chat System 1.0 has been identified, affecting the /admin/deleteroom.php file. The issue is due to SQL injection via the 'id' parameter, with potential for remote exploitation. The exploit details have been publicly disclosed.
